title: Client Modpack: Enhanced Unity
description: unites leading client-side mods for Minecraft to optimize visuals, performance, sounds, and immersion, enhancing overall gameplay experience. 1.21
body:
**Join the discord using this [link](https://discord.gg/hb3aTj6jzU) to report bugs, seek support or provide suggestions**

**Enhanced Unity is a client-side modpack tailored for Minecraft 1.21, prioritizing performance and graphical enhancements. Also featuring an upgraded sound system and integrates numerous quality-of-life mods, enriching your Minecraft experience to its fullest potential.**

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f3e2ea2795d0b140a4590dd9b29ce486309598d_0.webp)

Unlike other client-side modpacks such as Simply Optimized, this modpack goes beyond just enhancing performance; it also aims to elevate other aspects of the game such as visuals, sound, and quality of life improvements. While Simply Optimized focuses primarily on boosting performance, if you're looking for a holistic enhancement that enriches your gameplay experience across multiple dimensions, this modpack is designed with you in mind. For those whose priority is solely performance, an alternative like Fabulously Optimized may be more suitable. 


![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec86336df11a73e6b6cbcbe287bc4e28d324f7dc.png)

> ### **-Mod for everyone**👋
> No matter what type of player you are this mod supports what you do! It improves redstone player, Pvp players, technical players, survival players and many many more!

> ### **-Performance**⚡
> Enhanced Unity excels in optimizing game performance through modern-day mods like Sodium, Lithium, Ferritcore, and many others ensuring an immediate boost in performance for your game.

> ### **-Visual Enhancments**🌃
> With mods such as Voxy, Iris, Visuality, and more, you'll immerse yourself in breathtaking visuals unlike anything you've experienced before in Minecraft.

> ### **-Sound overhaul**🎧
> By incorporating mods like Sound Physics Perfected, Ambient Sounds, Sounds, and others, the game's sound becomes significantly more immersive and realistic, offering a refreshing and authentic experience.

> ### -Connect with your friends using essential!🔷
> By using the essential mod you can enjoy minecraft with your friends like never before by incorperating a friend system, messaging system, instant lan and much more

> ### **-Resource packs**🎨
> Enhanced the overhaul look of the game by using resource packs to improve the game visuals even further, with animated nature blocks, 3d blocks and items and more

> ### **-QOL mods**✨
> This modpack includes numerous quality-of-life improvements such as Ukulib armor hud, Chat Heads, and a variety of other features that is allowed in all public servers, enhancing your Minecraft experience with practical and useful additions.

> ### **-optifine alternatives**🎗️
> This mod incorporates various features similar to Optifine, such as OptiGUI, LambdaBetterLights, and more, ensuring you don't miss out on enhanced visuals and functionalities you had in Optifine.

> ### **-Enjoy better building**🔨
> Enjoy a new level of building with Axiom, worldedit, litematica and more. These building tools will help you reach new heights and allow you to build where creativity is your only limit

> ### **-Always improving**✅
> This mod will always seek improvement in ways such as newer features or bug fixes which will be added daily to improve further.
